message:
feat(core): add kd_tree.rs — k-dimensional tree for spatial nearest neighbor search (ft-283h4.44)

Arena-allocated KD-tree with build-from-points and incremental insert.
Supports nearest neighbor, k-nearest, range query, and radius query with
branch pruning. Includes VecPoint type for arbitrary dimensionality.
16 inline + 12 property-based tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
